user_query: Search my calendar for any events or meetings in the next 14 days.

plan.query: Search my calendar for any events or meetings in the next 14 days.
plan.reasoning: The user needs to check their upcoming calendar events, which can be done with a single query to the graph agent.

steps.task: Retrieve all calendar events or meetings scheduled in the next 14 days.

plan.synthesis: Present the events or meetings retrieved from the calendar query.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve all calendar events or meetings scheduled in the next 14 days.
